Icons#

Icons for GUI elements (such as viser.ViserServer.add_gui_button()) can be specified using the viser.Icon enum.

class viser.Icon[source]#

Icon enum.

We use open-source icons from Tabler, see:

https://tabler-icons.io/ https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons
